'''Toorka''' was a [[Police officer/Legends|police]] [[Detective/Legends|investigator]] on [[Elshandruu Pica]]. He was placed in charge of an investigation following [[Tanda Marelle|Tombat's]] theft of [[quella stone]]s from the resort hotel ''[[Margath's on Elshandruu Pica]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
